data.title: Dr. Rod J. Rohrich named Texas Monthly Super Doctor for 21st year in a row. Recognized in Dallas with consecutive honors.
data.description: Renowned plastic surgeon Dr. Rod J. Rohrich, based in Dallas, has received the prestigious recognition of being named a Texas Monthly Super Doctor for the 21st consecutive year. This achievement highlights his outstanding reputation among peers in the medical community. Dr. Rohrich's dedication to his profession has earned him this honor, showcasing his expertise and leadership in the field of plastic surgery. The continued acknowledgment by Texas Monthly underscores his consistent excellence in patient care and surgical outcomes. This news was revealed on February 19, 2026, emphasizing Dr. Rohrich's ongoing commitment to providing exceptional healthcare services.

data.title: Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest invests $25 million in Figma Inc after earnings beat; acquires 964,342 shares in total.
data.description: On Thursday, Cathie Wood's Ark Invest made significant trades, purchasing a noteworthy amount of Figma Inc (NYSE: FIG) shares. The Ark Innovation ETF and ARK Next Generation Internet ETF obtained a total of 964,342 Figma shares, with 823,965 shares bought by ARKK and 140,377 by ARKW. This purchase was valued at around $24.93 million based on the closing price of $25.86 per share. Figma's stock has shown an upward trend recently. The detailed news can be found on a finance news website.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies flat as Iran tensions rise. Bitcoin +0.75% at $67,156.46, Ethereum -0.46% at $1,953.81, XRP -0.03% at $1.41, Dogecoin +0.49% at $0.09881. Over $160M liquidated in 24 hours.BTC open interest rose 1.38%. Majority investors long on BTC.Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies remained relatively steady on Thursday as commodities saw gains due to President Donald Trump's consideration of a military attack on Iran. Bitcoin saw a 0.75% increase, reaching $67,156.46, while Ethereum decreased by 0.46% to $1,953.81. XRP dropped by 0.03% to $1.41, Solana increased by 1.62% to $82.96, and Dogecoin rose by 0.49% to $0.09881. The crypto market saw low trading volumes, with over $160 million liquidated in the last 24 hours and $105 million in bullish long bets erased. Bitcoin's open interest increased by 1.38%, indicating more short positions being taken. Binance faced the risk of liquidating $500 million in Bitcoin longs if the price falls to $60,000. Shares of Strategy Inc. closed up 3.39%, while Coinbase Global Inc. increased by 1.15%. Majority of Binance's retail and whale investors remained long on Bitcoin.

data.title: C3ntro Telecom receives financing from PROPARCO and DEG for 2,700km fiber project in Mexico. Supports network connecting data centers.
data.description: In Mexico City, C3ntro Telecom, a digital infrastructure and international telecommunications carrier based in Mexico, has secured a syndicated project finance facility from PROPARCO and DEG (KfW Group) to aid in the creation of its initial cross-border, long-haul fiber project. This funding is designated to bolster the Mexican portion of a unique 2,700-kilometer fiber network that will link hyperscale data centers in Querétaro, Mexico.

data.title: Tech execs claim AI agents are costly, with Jason Calacanis paying $110,000 yearly, exceeding most US salaries.
data.description: Jason Calacanis, a tech investor, has disclosed that he is investing approximately $110,000 annually to operate an AI agent. This amount surpasses the average annual salaries in the United States. However, Calacanis noted that the AI agent is not functioning at its maximum capacity.

data.title: Paladin Energy Ltd received Ministerial approval for its Patterson Lake South Project in Canada under EIS.
data.description: Paladin Energy Ltd (ASX:PDN, TSX:PDN, OTCQX:PALAF) based in Perth, Australia, has recently revealed that it obtained Ministerial approval for its Environmental Impact Statement (EIS) related to the Patterson Lake South (PLS) Project in the Athabasca Basin, Canada. This milestone was achieved under The Environmental Assessment Act (Saskatchewan) on Feb. 19, 2026. The approval signifies a significant step forward for the company in moving forward with the development of the PLS Project.

data.title: Prism Technology enhances global position with eco-friendly ink line, advanced carbon black pigment, and full brand redesign.
data.description: Advanced technology has led to a breakthrough in carbon black pigment, preventing nozzle clogging for up to 40 days of inactivity. The premium brand has strengthened its position with a complete packaging overhaul of its main product, Prism Photomax. Additionally, a strict quality control process has been put in place to ensure excellence in production.

data.title: Lundin Gold reported strong financial performance in 2025, with $1.78B revenues from 503,330 oz gold sales at $3,594/oz. Cash flow hit $926M, while gold production reached 498,315 oz. Investment in exploration and expansion of high-grade deposits noted, alongside $664M dividends and $1.15 dividend per share this year. Lundin Gold exits 2025 debt-free.
data.description: Lundin Gold Inc. reported significant financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company achieved record-breaking gold production of 498,315 oz with $926 million in free cash flow. Revenues reached $1.78 billion from sales of 503,330 oz at an average realized gold price of $3,594 per oz. The Fruta del Norte mine in Ecuador showed strong performance, with cash operating costs of $838/oz and all-in sustaining costs of $1,015/oz. Lundin Gold also returned a record $664 million in dividends during the year. The company conducted a successful exploration program, drilling 121,519 meters, showcasing potential for growth within the land package. With no debt and a growing pipeline of opportunities, Lundin Gold emphasizes disciplined execution and responsible growth. Key operational figures for 2025 included 498,315 oz of gold produced, 5,009 tpd average throughput, and 89.0% average recovery rate. Lundin Gold's future looks promising with a focus on strategic flexibility and continued growth.
